title: Thai Duck Stir Fry
description: A flavorful and quick stir fry recipe featuring duck breast cooked in a Thai-inspired sauce. A perfect dish for a weeknight dinner.
instructions: Heat oil in a wok or large skillet over medium-high heat.
Add duck breast and cook until browned on both sides, about 2-3 minutes per side.
Remove duck from the skillet and set aside.
Add curry paste to the skillet and stir until fragrant, about 1 minute.
Add bell peppers and cook until tender, about 3-4 minutes.
Return duck breast to the skillet and stir in fish sauce and soy sauce.
Cook for an additional 2-3 minutes, until sauce has thickened.
Garnish with fresh Thai basil leaves and serve immediately.
